terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.translationNotice: This English version is provided for convenience. If there is any conflict between this translation and the Korean original, the Korean version governs.

sections.title: Article 1 (Purpose)
sections.body: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using the GitHub repository analysis and visualization service provided by Codeprint (the "Service"), and the rights and obligations between users and the Service.

sections.title: Article 2 (Definitions)
list: "Service" means the code analysis and graph visualization platform provided by Codeprint.
"User" means an individual who agrees to these Terms and uses the Service.
"Content" means all material a user creates, uploads, or posts through the Service.

sections.title: Article 3 (Eligibility)
sections.body: The Service is available to anyone with a GitHub account. Users under 14 require consent from a legal guardian. Using the Service constitutes agreement to these Terms.

sections.title: Article 4 (Service Content)
list: Free plan: unlimited private projects, team collaboration up to 5 people
Pro · Desktop: no collaboration session member limit, create real teams and manage seats (1 personal seat or N team seats, monthly per-seat fee. Desktop app coming soon)
sections.footer: The Service may add, change, or discontinue features without prior notice, and may experience temporary interruptions for stability purposes.

sections.title: Article 5 (User Obligations)
sections.body: Users must not engage in the following:
list: Stealing another person's account or personal information
Interfering with the stable operation of the Service (excessive API requests, automated crawling, etc.)
Posting content that infringes on others' copyrights or intellectual property
Posting illegal, obscene, or hateful content in violation of law
Using the Service to provide paid services to third parties for commercial purposes

sections.title: Article 6 (Analysis Accuracy and Disclaimer)
sections.body: The Service's code analysis is static-analysis-based and provides approximately 85–90% accuracy. Dynamic calls, runtime dependencies, and similar patterns may not be detected. Analysis results are a reference "automatic draft," and users are responsible for any judgments or decisions based on them.

sections.title: Article 7 (Intellectual Property)
sections.body: Intellectual property rights in the Service and the graph UI, icons, and design generated by the Service belong to Codeprint. Copyright in code used for analysis belongs to its respective owner, and the Service does not store or use such code beyond the purpose of analysis.

sections.title: Article 8 (Handling of Personal Information)
sections.bodyBefore: User personal information is processed in accordance with the

sections.title: Article 9 (Service Suspension and Termination)
sections.body: If the Service is permanently discontinued, users will be notified at least 30 days in advance. Paid Pro · Desktop users will be informed separately of the refund policy for any remaining period.

sections.title: Article 10 (Changes to Terms)
sections.body: When these Terms are changed, the changes and effective date will be announced via the Service notice board or email at least 7 days in advance. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes agreement to the changed Terms.

sections.title: Article 11 (Governing Law and Jurisdiction)
sections.body: These Terms are interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea, and the Seoul Central District Court has exclusive jurisdiction over disputes between the Service and users.

sections.title: Contact
sections.linkText: Please reach out via the Contact

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.translationNotice: This English version is provided for convenience. If there is any conflict between this translation and the Korean original, the Korean version governs.

s1.title: 1. Personal Information Collected
s1.intro: The Service collects the following information via GitHub OAuth login.
list: GitHub username (login)
Email address
Profile image URL
GitHub unique ID
s1.outro: When you use the analysis feature, GitHub repository metadata (repo name, branch list, file structure) is processed temporarily. Original source code files are deleted immediately after analysis and are not permanently stored on our servers.

s2.title: 2. Purpose of Collection
list: Identity verification and service login
Profile display and user identification
Storing and retrieving projects and analysis results
Community features (displaying post authors)
Service improvement and usage statistics analysis

s3.title: 3. Retention Period
s3.intro: Personal information is retained until account deletion and is destroyed immediately upon withdrawal, except where retention is required by law, in which case it is kept for the applicable period.
list: E-commerce transaction records: 5 years (Act on Consumer Protection in E-Commerce)
Consumer complaint/dispute resolution records: 3 years (Act on Consumer Protection in E-Commerce)

s4.title: 4. Third-Party Disclosure
s4.intro: The Service does not disclose users' personal information to third parties in principle, except in the following cases.
list: When the user has given prior consent
When disclosure is required by law
Infrastructure partners operating the Service (Railway, Vercel, AWS S3 — limited to data processing purposes)

s5.title: 5. Use of Cookies
s5.body: The Service uses HttpOnly Secure cookies to maintain login state (JWT tokens). These cookies cannot be accessed by browser scripts, protecting against XSS attacks. The Service does not currently use separate analytics cookies for usage statistics.

s6.title: 6. User Rights
s6.intro: Users may exercise the following rights at any time.
list: Request to view or correct personal information
Request to delete personal information (account deletion)
Request to suspend processing of personal information
s6.outroAfter: , and will be processed within 10 business days.

s7.title: 7. Protection of Minors
s7.body: We do not collect personal information from children under 14 without consent from a legal guardian. If we become aware that we have collected such information, it is destroyed immediately.

s8.title: 8. Personal Information Protection Officer
s8.intro: For inquiries, complaints, or remedies related to personal information processing, please contact us below.

s9.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
s9.body: If this Policy changes, the changes and effective date will be announced in advance via the Service notice board.
